boundaries.title_guess: Herefordshire: Bromyard, Eardisland, Burton Hall & Croft Castle

evidence.excerpt: Thursday May 31st. 5.15. We set off for the farm.
We stopped in Bromyard + went on to Eardisland... We walked around Burton Hall.
Croft Castle ... June 3rd Sunday

boundaries.title_guess: Farnham: Hattie & Ramsey's wedding

evidence.excerpt: August 4th, Saturday. At 9 Simon, Eve & Tinder left for Hattie's & Ramsey's wedding at Farnham.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0314_R holds the end of the Croft Castle trip context, the short Farnham wedding weekend, AND the start of the Rhayader trip (Wed Aug 16th) lower on the page.

boundaries.title_guess: Wales: Rhayader, Elan Valley (Wyside)

evidence.excerpt: Wed Aug 16th. We left at 12.45 & went to Brook House Farm... On to Rhayader in the middle of Wales. We are camped at Wyside Club Site.
We drove up to the 3rd lake in the Elan Valley

boundaries.mixed_detail: Starts mid-page after the Farnham wedding weekend ends on the same page (B_0314_R).

boundaries.title_guess: The farm: hop-picking (late August)

evidence.excerpt: Aug 26th Saturday~~ Sunday. Simon & Eve at farm for hop-picking. Parked in courtyard. Came home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Rhayader trip ends ('In the van on the way to the farm now to pick up the smalls... Came home') then a brief farm hop-picking outing starts in the last lines of B_0315_R.

boundaries.title_guess: Dormston (Dornston): St Nicholas church & blackberrying

evidence.excerpt: Friday 28th Sept 4 pm. Simon, Eve, Tinder -> Dornston.
lunch + home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0316_L contains the whole short Dornston trip (Sept 28-29) AND the start of the April 5th 2019 Newark Park trip lower on the page.

boundaries.title_guess: Gloucestershire: near Barnsley, Newark Park (Ashen Mains)

evidence.excerpt: April 5th 2019. Simon, Eve + Tinder come to near Barnsley. Arrived 5:30.
Ashen Mains campsite ... Newark Park, Gloucs
April 6th ... We drove to Newark Park.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Starts in the last lines of B_0316_L after the Dornston trip ends with 'lunch + home'.

boundaries.title_guess: Northampton: 78 Derngate (Mackintosh house)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday April 28th. We shd have left at 8.30... booked into a 10.30 tour of Dern Gate, Mackintosh's house in Northampton.
On the way home we stopped with Judith Kirby for lunch at Bierton

boundaries.mixed_detail: Newark Park trip ends on B_0318_L ('Frampton on Severn... Then on to home.') then the Derngate day/overnight trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Dursley: Athen Plains family gathering (Newark Park)

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 10th. 3.15. Simon, Eve & Tinder left... We are going back to Dursley. We arrived at Athen Plains

boundaries.title_guess: Thorpeness: Monig & Leo's wedding reception (Suffolk)

evidence.excerpt: Friday 24th May 7.30 am Simon, Eve & Tinder left for Monig's & Leo's wedding reception at Thorpeness.
Walk into Aldeburgh... Of to a kampsite Arbon Barn in Whepstead.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Dursley trip ends on B_0319_R ('went to Stroud, but most of Stroud closed. Then home.') then the Thorpeness wedding trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: France: Provence & Burgundy (Pesmes, Malaucene, Senanque, St Tropez, Orange, Baie de Somme)

evidence.excerpt: 6th June, Thursday. Lots of news on Radio about D Day landings 75 years ago. We left the house at 1 + dropped Tinker off at kennels... reached Stalisfield
June 7th. Horrid crossing... We headed south
east past Rheims... we reached huremont et Villotte

boundaries.mixed_detail: Thorpeness wedding trip ends on B_0320_R ('We had lunch east of Nazeby before going home') then the long France trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Wales: Penn Onn (St Illtud), Brecon, Merthyr Cynog

evidence.excerpt: St. Illtud's Church Llanilltud Fawr
Friday 16th August. Peter had left his car at 86... We drove his car to Penn Onn.

boundaries.title_guess: Seamark & Butley Priory: Sam & Iona's wedding (Suffolk)

evidence.excerpt: Friday Sept 27th. We had trouble leaving... set off at 8.10... On to Seamark where we camped in the garden.
a coach from the Dolphin took us to the Priory Butley Pr. near Orford... Sam + Iona's wedding.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Wales/Penn Onn trip ends on B_0335_R (Monday Berrington Hall, 'On the way home we called in on Helen') then the Seamark trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Alcester & Studley: visit to Studley Campers

evidence.excerpt: October 11th Friday. Simon, Eve + Tincts went to Alcester to pick up... papers... then on to Studley to see Studley Campers.
ideas for a new camping van. Home at 5.20.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Butley Priory wedding trip ends on B_0336_L ('there was a hog roast + we drove home. A lovely weekend.') then the short Alcester/Studley day trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Cotswolds: Burford & Bourton-on-the-Water (first trip after lockdown)

evidence.excerpt: July 4th 2020. Field Barn Park. Simon, Charles, Arrington, Eve + Tindes set off at 8.05. for Burford. This is our first night away since N.I. in February - we have had Covid 19 Lockdown.
Bourton on the water... Stow... Rollright Stones

boundaries.mixed_detail: Alcester/Studley trip ends at top of B_0336_R ('Home at 5.20.') then the July 2020 Burford trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Ross on Wye (New House Farm) & visit to John, Kay & Eben

evidence.excerpt: Friday July 10th. We sold the house, 86, this week... Simon & Eve & Tinder set off at 3.30, to near Ross on Wye. The site is on a farm, New House Farm.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Burford/Bourton trip ends on B_0337_R ('Simon & Eve left in Peter's green mercedes to go home... Peter brought the van back on Wednesday.') then the Ross on Wye trip starts on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Thorpeness via Wimpole Hall (Suffolk)

evidence.excerpt: Monday July 20th. Off to Thorpeness with champagne + everyone except Charles + Austin... met up with John + Kay + Eben at Wimpole Hall... on to Thorpe.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Ross on Wye trip ends at top of B_0338_L ('We had a super visit... Home after lunch on Sunday.') then the Thorpeness trip starts on the same page; an Oxford day-out (Sat 25th July) is also noted.

boundaries.title_guess: The farm: hop-picking (23rd August)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday 23rd August. Tinder, Simon + Eve set off at 4.30. for hop picking at the farm... We stayed from Sunday to Saturday.

boundaries.title_guess: The farm: hop-picking again (30th August)

evidence.excerpt: We return again Sunday Aug 30th. We set off at 16.40... We are heading home now to go to a socially distanced street party with our neighbours-to-be at George Rd.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Second distinct farm outing departing/returning home, starting on the same page (B_0338_R) after the 23rd Aug outing ends.

boundaries.title_guess: The farm: hop-picking (8th September) & William's birthday

evidence.excerpt: Tuesday 8th September. Simon, Eve + Tinder returned to the farm. William's birthday + more hop-picking. We returned on Saturday 12th September.

boundaries.title_guess: Monmouth: 3 Horseshoes, John & Kay & Eben (Symonds Yat)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday September 27th 2020... At 9.15. we set off to John's... met John, Kay + Eben at the 3 Horseshoes... Then home, via a pretty field with a view of Symonds Yat.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Starts mid-page after the 8th Sept farm outing ends ('We returned on Saturday 12th September.') on B_0339_L.

boundaries.title_guess: The farm: delivering furniture (4th October)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday October 4th. At 2.30. we drove off to the farm with the white sofa + chair... 4 Gordon Russell chairs.
Sunshine on the way home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Starts mid-page after the Monmouth outing ends ('Then home') on B_0339_L; continues onto B_0339_R.

boundaries.title_guess: Bedfordshire: Wrest Park, Berkhamstead, Aylesbury, Chandlers Ford, Edge Hill (new Peugeot Boxer van)

evidence.excerpt: NEW VAN Peugeot Boxer. 27 October 2020. Set off quite soon after breakfast to rural Bedfordshire... near an English Heritage site, Wrest Park.
Witney... Finstock (the Plough)... a campsite at Edge Hill NW of Banbury
On Saturday, the weather looked pretty miserable so we decided to end the trip a little early.

notes: Window covers book5 early pages (index entries ~13-43), spanning 2018-2019 weekend/UK trips, the long June 2019 France trip (B_0320_R-B_0333), and a cluster of short 2020 Covid-era farm/family outings (B_0336_R-B_0339) plus the Oct 2020 new-van Bedfordshire trip. Many physical pages are mixed because short outings are packed several per page; the repeated farm hop-picking outings (Aug 23, Aug 30, Sept 8, Oct 4 2020) are each a depart-home/return-home cycle and reported separately at lower confidence. Page numbers written in the diary are jumbled (e.g. B_0332_R shows '83'), so dating relies on dated headings and narrative rather than the 'no' fields.
